thi7:1.0.175: “Taking a pestle,young men pound grain.Supporting partners and children,young men acquire wealth.
thi7:1.0.176: Work at the Buddha’s bidding,you won’t regret it.Having quickly washed your feet,sit in a discreet place to meditate.
thi7:1.0.177: Establish the mind,unified and serene.Examine conditionsas other, not as self.”
thi7:1.0.178: “After hearing her words,the instructions of Paṭācārā,I washed my feetand retired to a discreet place.
thi7:1.0.179: In the first watch of the night,I recollected my past lives.In the middle watch of the night,I purified my clairvoyance.
thi7:1.0.180: In the last watch of the night,I shattered the mass of darkness.I rose up master of the three knowledges:your bidding has been done.
thi7:1.0.181: I shall abide honoring youas the thirty gods honor Sakka,undefeated in battle.Master of the three knowledges, I am free of defilements.”
thi7:1.0.182: “As a nun with developed faculties,having established mindfulness,I penetrated that peaceful state,the blissful stilling of conditions.”
thi7:1.0.183: “In whose name did you shave your head?You look like an ascetic,but you don’t believe in any creed.Why do you live as if lost?”
thi7:1.0.184: “Followers of other creedsrely on their views.They don’t understand the Dhamma,for they’re no experts in the Dhamma.
thi7:1.0.185: But there is one born in the Sakyan clan,the unrivaled Buddha;he taught me the Dhammafor going beyond views.
thi7:1.0.186: Suffering, suffering’s origin,suffering’s transcendence,and the noble eightfold paththat leads to the stilling of suffering.
thi7:1.0.187: After hearing his words,I happily did his bidding.I’ve attained the three knowledgesand fulfilled the Buddha’s instructions.
thi7:1.0.188: Relishing is destroyed in every respect,and the mass of darkness is shattered.So know this, Wicked One:you’re beaten, terminator!”
thi7:1.0.189: “A nun with faculties developed,mindful, seeing clearly,I penetrated that peaceful state,which sinners do not cultivate.”
thi7:1.0.190: “Why don’t you approve of rebirth?When you’re born, you get to enjoy sensual pleasures.Enjoy the delights of sensual pleasure;don’t regret it later.”
thi7:1.0.191: “Death comes to those who are born;and when born they fall into suffering:the chopping off of hands and feet,killing, caging, misery.
thi7:1.0.192: But there is one born in the Sakyan clan,an awakened champion.He taught me the Dhammafor passing beyond rebirth:
thi7:1.0.193: suffering, suffering’s origin,suffering’s transcendence,and the noble eightfold paththat leads to the stilling of suffering.
thi7:1.0.194: After hearing his words,I happily did his bidding.I’ve attained the three knowledgesand fulfilled the Buddha’s instructions.
thi7:1.0.195: Relishing is destroyed in every respect,and the mass of darkness is shattered.So know this, Wicked One:you’re beaten, terminator!”
